title: Sqlitelogictest cast NULL to integer failing
key_bug_features: Casting NULL to integer in SQL query
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, value INTEGER, name VARCHAR(50));
SELECT id, value + CAST(NULL AS INTEGER) AS computed_value FROM test_table;
SELECT name FROM test_table WHERE value IS NULL OR value = (SELECT MAX(value) FROM test_table);
